642854b5-88b4-4c40-b256-e035532109df.name: Transparent Zen
642854b5-88b4-4c40-b256-e035532109df.description: Make the Zen Browser's tab background transparent, get smooth animations and more. Enable  features in mod settings and visit the homepage below to learn more about the features. 👇
